turns.user_message: I used to shake off criticism easily, but today it just stuck with me. It's making me feel pretty low.
Now every little bit of feedback feels like a personal failure. I can't seem to let anything go anymore.
I'm completely paralyzed by the thought of anyone judging my work. I just feel hollow and defensive all the time.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This used to not bother the speaker.
